category_sources: Official ECMWF Magics page describes meteorological plotting and visualization of contours, wind fields, observations, satellite images, and graphs.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is magics; official ECMWF page title and text use Magics.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official ECMWF Confluence Magics page with installation, usage, reference guide, FAQ, and release links.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official ECMWF Magics page provides source release archives but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies ECMWF meteorological plotting software; official ECMWF page lists supported meteorological plot types and scientific data formats.
